/usr/bin/gcc -fPIC  -isystem  -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libbarf.so -o libbarf.so ../common/CMakeFiles/barf_common.dir/log.c/src/log.c.o   -L/home/jacob/.local/lib  -L/usr/lib64/openmpi/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jacob/.local/lib:/usr/lib64/openmpi/lib ../common/libbarf_common.a -lm -lpthread -lgfortran -lucp -luct -lucs
